1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

SVG is missing accessible name

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cmplz-link cmplz-external cmplz-read-more-purposes tcf" href="https://cookiedatabase.org/tcf/purposes/" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank">Les mer om disse formålene</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input autocomplete="off" class="form-control hasDatepicker" id="dummy_user_dato" style="background-color:#ffffff;"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select aria-hidden="true" autocomplete="off" class="form-control select2-hidden-accessible" id="date_hour" name="date_hour" required="required" tabindex="-1"> <option hidden="" id="00" value="00:00">
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input id="stopsInput" oninput="findMatchedStops()" placeholder="Skriv inn holdeplass.." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (84 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="nectar-skip-to-content" href="#ajax-content-wrap" tabindex="1">Skip to main content</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive select has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<select aria-hidden="true" autocomplete="off" class="form-control select2-hidden-accessible" id="date_hour" name="date_hour" required="required" tabindex="-1"> <option hidden="" id="00" value="00:00">
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'https://ny.brakar.no/reiseinformasjon/reiser-med-andre/' appears 2 times

id="https://ny.brakar.no/reiseinformasjon/reiser-med-andre/"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'https://ny.brakar.no/fleks/' appears 2 times

id="https://ny.brakar.no/fleks/"
Each ID must be unique on the page
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="ui-datepicker-calendar"><thead><tr><th class="ui-datepicker-week-end" scope="col"><span title="Sunday">Su</span></th><th scope="col"><span title="Monday">Mo</span></th><th scope="col"><s
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe id="config-load-iframe" src="https://wchat.freshchat.com/widget/config_iframe.html?host=https://wchat.freshchat.com&token=09df0958-1227-4a73-94e0-de90fa178f51&origin=https://brakar.no"
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<a aria-controls="route_planner_search" data-toggle="tab" href="#route_planner_search" id="route_planner_search_trigger" role="tab" tabindex="12"> Finn reise </a>
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<a aria-controls="sis_realtime_information_search" data-toggle="tab" href="#sis_realtime_information_search" id="sis_realtime_information_search_trigger" role="tab" tabindex="13">
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<select aria-hidden="true" class="form-control select2-hidden-accessible" id="nar" name="nar" tabindex="17"> <option value="0">Nå</option> <option value="1">Avgang</option> <option value="2">Ankomst</
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Reiser med andre kollektivselskaper - Brakar

https://brakar.no/reiseinformasjon/reiser-med-andre/
Avvik: 63 | Bestått: 94
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cmplz-link cmplz-external cmplz-read-more-purposes tcf" href="https://cookiedatabase.org/tcf/purposes/" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank">Les mer om disse formålene</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-id="http://design.brakar.no" data-type="link" href="https://snohq.io/designmanuals/brakar/" rel="noreferrer noopener" tabindex="41" target="_blank">Grafisk profil</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="" href="#" id="to-top" tabindex="51"><i class="fa fa-angle-up"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (51 avvik)

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)

Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="https://ny.brakar.no/fleks/"

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe id="config-load-iframe" src="https://wchat.freshchat.com/widget/config_iframe.html?host=https://wchat.freshchat.com&token=09df0958-1227-4a73-94e0-de90fa178f51&origin=https://brakar.no"

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

Informasjonskapsler - Brakar

https://brakar.no/personvern/informasjonskapsler/
Avvik: 63 | Bestått: 96
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">Hjelp oss å teste en ny billett-app: <br/>Du betaler kun for distansen du reiser. </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="gsection_title">Påmeldingskjema</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="tablepress tablepress-id-60" id="tablepress-60"> <thead> <tr class="row-1"> <th class="column-1">Steg</th><th class="column-2">Handling</th><th class="column-3">Appen</th> </tr> </thead>
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="column-1">Steg</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="column-2">Handling</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="column-3">Appen</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

<a class="wp-block-social-link-anchor" href="https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCoshZyTfic_tpQsXk7ci6Ew" tabindex="83"><svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="24" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 24
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (84) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="" href="#" id="to-top" tabindex="84"><i class="fa fa-angle-up"></i></a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'false' appears 6 times

id="false"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'https://ny.brakar.no/reiseinformasjon/reiser-med-andre/' appears 2 times

id="https://ny.brakar.no/reiseinformasjon/reiser-med-andre/"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'https://ny.brakar.no/fleks/' appears 2 times

id="https://ny.brakar.no/fleks/"
Each ID must be unique on the page
1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video autoplay="" controls="" loop="" playsinline="" src="https://brakar.no/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Fairtiq-Sveip-reis-nyt-turen.mp4"></video>
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video autoplays with sound

<video autoplay="" controls="" loop="" playsinline="" src="https://brakar.no/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Fairtiq-Sveip-reis-nyt-turen.mp4"></video>
Either remove autoplay, add muted attribute, or provide controls to stop/mute
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe id="config-load-iframe" src="https://wchat.freshchat.com/widget/config_iframe.html?host=https://wchat.freshchat.com&token=09df0958-1227-4a73-94e0-de90fa178f51&origin=https://brakar.no"
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Rutetabeller - Brakar

https://brakar.no/ruter/
Avvik: 381 | Bestått: 397
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="wp-image-23227 alignnone" decoding="async" height="1026" sizes="(max-width: 681px) 100vw, 681px" src="https://brakar.no/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Plattformkart-Drammen-busstasjon-6
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="alignnone wp-image-23663" decoding="async" height="963" sizes="(max-width: 681px) 100vw, 681px" src="https://brakar.no/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Bragernes-torg-plattformkart-A3-hvi
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="alignleft wp-image-23220" decoding="async" height="799" loading="lazy" sizes="auto, (max-width: 799px) 100vw, 799px" src="https://brakar.no/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Linjekart-Dram
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="ea-header"> <a aria-expanded="false" class="collapsed" data-sptarget="#collapse186060" data-sptoggle="spcollapse" data-title="efaq-drammen" href="javascript:void(0)" rel="nofollow" tabindex
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (300 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cmplz-link cmplz-external cmplz-read-more-purposes tcf" href="https://cookiedatabase.org/tcf/purposes/" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank">Les mer om disse formålene</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a aria-expanded="false" class="collapsed" data-sptarget="#collapse186060" data-sptoggle="spcollapse" data-title="efaq-drammen" href="javascript:void(0)" rel="nofollow" tabindex="12"> <i class="ea-exp
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (68 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="nectar-skip-to-content" href="#ajax-content-wrap" tabindex="1">Skip to main content</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<input aria-label="Søk" name="s" placeholder="Search" tabindex="2" type="text" value=""/>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a href="#" tabindex="3"><span class="screen-reader-text">Lukk søk</span> <span class="close-wrap"> <span class="close-line close-line1"></span> <span class="close-line close-line2"></span> </span> </

<a class="cmplz-link cmplz-external cmplz-read-more-purposes tcf" href="https://cookiedatabase.org/tcf/purposes/" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank">Read more about these purposes</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="wp-block-tiptip-hyperlink-group-block" href="http://brakar.no/tryggskolevei/" rel="noreferrer noopener" tabindex="42" target="_blank"> <div class="wp-block-cover is-light" style="min-height:
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="wp-block-tiptip-hyperlink-group-block" href="https://brakar.no/priser-og-billetter/app/#efaq-kan-jeg-fa-varsel-i-appen-ved-avvik-i-busstrafikken" rel="noreferrer noopener" tabindex="43" targ
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="" href="#" id="to-top" tabindex="80"><i class="fa fa-angle-up"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input autocomplete="off" class="form-control hasDatepicker" id="dummy_user_dato" style="background-color:#ffffff;"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select aria-hidden="true" autocomplete="off" class="form-control select2-hidden-accessible" id="date_hour" name="date_hour" required="required" tabindex="-1"> <option hidden="" id="00" value="00:00">
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input id="stopsInput" oninput="findMatchedStops()" placeholder="Skriv inn holdeplass.." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (80 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive select has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<select aria-hidden="true" autocomplete="off" class="form-control select2-hidden-accessible" id="date_hour" name="date_hour" required="required" tabindex="-1"> <option hidden="" id="00" value="00:00">
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="ui-datepicker-calendar"><thead><tr><th class="ui-datepicker-week-end" scope="col"><span title="Sunday">Su</span></th><th scope="col"><span title="Monday">Mo</span></th><th scope="col"><s
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe id="config-load-iframe" src="https://wchat.freshchat.com/widget/config_iframe.html?host=https://wchat.freshchat.com&token=09df0958-1227-4a73-94e0-de90fa178f51&origin=https://brakar.no"
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<a aria-controls="route_planner_search" data-toggle="tab" href="#route_planner_search" id="route_planner_search_trigger" role="tab" tabindex="12"> Find trip </a>
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<a aria-controls="sis_realtime_information_search" data-toggle="tab" href="#sis_realtime_information_search" id="sis_realtime_information_search_trigger" role="tab" tabindex="13">
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<select aria-hidden="true" class="form-control select2-hidden-accessible" id="nar" name="nar" tabindex="17"> <option value="0">Now</option> <option value="1">Departure</option> <option value="2">Arriv
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Personvern - Brakar

https://brakar.no/personvern/
Avvik: 69 | Bestått: 117
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (6 avvik)

SVG is missing accessible name

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cmplz-link cmplz-external cmplz-read-more-purposes tcf" href="https://cookiedatabase.org/tcf/purposes/" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank">Les mer om disse formålene</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-id="http://design.brakar.no" data-type="link" href="https://snohq.io/designmanuals/brakar/" rel="noreferrer noopener" tabindex="45" target="_blank">Grafisk profil</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="" href="#" id="to-top" tabindex="55"><i class="fa fa-angle-up"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'https://ny.brakar.no/reiseinformasjon/reiser-med-andre/' appears 2 times

id="https://ny.brakar.no/reiseinformasjon/reiser-med-andre/"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'https://ny.brakar.no/fleks/' appears 2 times

id="https://ny.brakar.no/fleks/"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe id="config-load-iframe" src="https://wchat.freshchat.com/widget/config_iframe.html?host=https://wchat.freshchat.com&token=09df0958-1227-4a73-94e0-de90fa178f51&origin=https://brakar.no"
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Trafikkmeldinger - Brakar

https://brakar.no/trafikkmeldinger/
Avvik: 66 | Bestått: 99
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Midlertidig stenging av Hallermoen holdeplass</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cmplz-link cmplz-external cmplz-read-more-purposes tcf" href="https://cookiedatabase.org/tcf/purposes/" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank">Les mer om disse formålene</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-id="http://design.brakar.no" data-type="link" href="https://snohq.io/designmanuals/brakar/" rel="noreferrer noopener" tabindex="42" target="_blank">Grafisk profil</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="" href="#" id="to-top" tabindex="52"><i class="fa fa-angle-up"></i></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

<body>

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe id="config-load-iframe" src="https://wchat.freshchat.com/widget/config_iframe.html?host=https://wchat.freshchat.com&token=09df0958-1227-4a73-94e0-de90fa178f51&origin=https://brakar.no"

MODERATE

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cmplz-link cmplz-external cmplz-read-more-purposes tcf" href="https://cookiedatabase.org/tcf/purposes/" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank">Les mer om disse formålene</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="wp-block-tiptip-hyperlink-group-block" href="https://brakar.no/min-side/" tabindex="15"> <div aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer" style="height:20px"></div> </a>

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1

SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'false' appears 3 times

id="false"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="https://ny.brakar.no/reiseinformasjon/reiser-med-andre/"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe id="config-load-iframe" src="https://wchat.freshchat.com/widget/config_iframe.html?host=https://wchat.freshchat.com&token=09df0958-1227-4a73-94e0-de90fa178f51&origin=https://brakar.no"
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://brakar.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://brakar.no --max-pages 16 --format html
